Surname.jp: 【獣人解放戦線】の前向き戦士

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체에게 피해를 입힙니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 对全体敌人造成伤害。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: (Passive Effect) When hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52508_0]</color> chance to reduce the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Pressure Festival</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_1] turn(s)</color> and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_0]</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52508_0]</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>압박축제</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_1]턴</color> 감소하고, <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_0]</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)ダメージを受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52508_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【三散祭り】</color>のスキルターンが<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_1]ターン</color>減少し、<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_0]</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)受到攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52508_0]</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>压迫庆典</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_1]回合</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52508_0]</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52509_0]</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52509_0] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52509_0]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52509_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52509_0]</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52509_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52509_0]</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52509_0]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) Attacks all enemies with an <color=#28d9ed>additional attack</color> when an ally lands a debuff on an enemy on their turn.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 아군 팀이 자신의 턴에 적에게 약화 효과 적중 시 <color=#28d9ed>추가타</color>로 적 전체를 공격 합니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)味方が自分のターンで敵に弱体効果を付与した場合、<color=#28d9ed>追加攻撃</color>で敵全体にダメージを与える。
description.zh: (触发效果)\n友军在自身回合对敌人造成弱化效果时,以<color=#28d9ed>额外攻击</color>对全体敌人进行攻击。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
